description: Legal document. Dated: Monday, 8 Kislev 1463 Seleucid = 18 November 1151 CE. Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm al-ʿAṭṭār al-Siqillī and Abū l-ʿAlāʾ al-Kohen al-Munādī testify regarding the deathbed will of Makhlūf [b.] Faḍḍāl al-Qābisī. Makhlūf declared before them that his son Faḍḍāl, also in the drug trade, owes him nothing, not even the obligation to pay for his burial expenses. He also told Faḍḍāl before the witnesses that he has no money to leave for his wife, and he requests that Faḍḍāl give her a dinar out of his own money. Faḍḍāl declines to fulfill this wish. Witnesses: Efrayim b. Meshullam; Hillel b. Ṣadoq Av Bet Din; and Natan b. Shemuel he-ḥaver.
description_he: מסמך משפטי. מתוארך: שני, 8 כסלו 1463 סלאוקי = 18 נובמבר 1151. אבו יצחק איברהים ואבו אל-עלא הכהן מעידים על צוואת גוסס של מח'לוף בן פד'אל. מח'לוף הצהיר שבנו פד'אל אינו חייב לו דבר. פד'אל מסרב לתת לאשתו דינר.
